untranslatable_reason: This signal is based on point-and-figure chart pattern analysis (ascending triple top breakout and triple bottom breakout). The allowed indicators are all based on OHLCV bar data and technical indicators derived from price/volume. Point-and-figure charts track column progressions of X's and O's which cannot be reconstructed from standard bar data without the original P&F chart construction parameters (box size, reversal amount). The specific pattern recognition required ('X one box above highest X in last column', 'O below lowest O in last descending column') is not expressible using the available indicators.
translation_notes: Signal requires point-and-figure chart pattern recognition. Attempted approximation using prev_high/prev_low crossovers as a rough proxy for column reversals, but this does not capture the true triple-top/triple-bottom pattern logic from P&F analysis.
